issues.description: Missing required condition: LeaderIsName 'Iceburg'. Current condition is 'Always', but effect text specifies 'If your Leader is [Iceburg]'.
GiveDon action is incomplete. Missing 'source' field specifying 'DON!! deck' as the source. Current DSL does not indicate DON!! cards come from deck.

Action order/logic unclear. Text says 'You may rest this Stage' (optional), then conditional 'If your Leader is [Iceburg], add up to 1 DON!! card'. DSL should reflect that resting is a cost, and the DON!! addition is conditional on Leader check, not just always triggered.
